name: drei-trail
title: Trail
author: pmndrs contributors
description: Attaches a configurable MeshLine trail to moving scene content.

files.content: import { ForwardRefExoticComponent, PropsWithoutRef, RefAttributes } from 'react' /** * Allows using a TS v4 labeled tuple even with older typescript versions */ export type NamedArrayTuple any> = Parameters /** * Utility type to declare the type of a `forwardRef` component so that the type is not "evaluated" in the declaration * file. */ export type ForwardRefComponent = ForwardRefExoticComponent & RefAttributes> export type NonFunctionKeys = { [K in keyof T]-?: T[K] extends Function ? never : K }[keyof T] export type Overwrite = Omit> & O
